message.content:
Test file: src/claim-office.spec.ts
Implementation file: src/claim-office.ts
Failing test: "sword with enchantment 5 (new customer): 100 base + 30 high-enchantment + 10 first insurance + 5 fee = 145 G"
Passing tests so far: 11

Spec: "Highly enchanted items (enchantment level >= 5) add a 30% risk surcharge."

The current implementation already has `itemSurcharge(item)` that handles cursed. Extend it to also add 30% if item.enchantment >= 5. Both surcharges can apply (additive).

For this test: item base = 100, enchantment=5 → +30. Total surcharge = 30. cursed: false → 0 cursed surcharge. policy base 100, first insurance 10, fee 5 → 100 + 30 + 10 + 5 = 145. ✓

Make sure component items (rune, moonstone) which have no enchantment field don't break — they should have 0 surcharge.

Run `pnpm test` to verify all 12 tests pass.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, return after completion.

content.text: I'll analyze the current implementation and extend it minimally to handle the enchantment surcharge.

content.content: The file /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-17_03-23-26_claim-office-example-mapping_v7-hybrid-green-refactor_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.ts has been updated successfully.

input.old_string:
const itemSurcharge = (item: any): number =>
  item.cursed ? percentOf(itemBasePremium(item), CURSED_SURCHARGE_PERCENT) : 0;

content.text:
All 12 tests pass.

🟢 Green Phase Complete:
**Implementation**: Extended `itemSurcharge(item)` to add a 30% enchantment surcharge when `item.enchantment >= 5`. Both cursed and enchantment surcharges are additive on top of the item's base premium. Items without an enchantment field (rune, moonstone) safely evaluate `undefined >= 5` as false, contributing 0.
**Result**: All tests now pass (12 passing, 26 todo)
**Approach**: Minimal extension to the existing surcharge function — added two constants (`HIGH_ENCHANTMENT_SURCHARGE_PERCENT = 30`, `HIGH_ENCHANTMENT_THRESHOLD = 5`) and a single conditional clause. No refactoring of structure, no premature optimization.

Relevant file: `/home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-17_03-23-26_claim-office-example-mapping_v7-hybrid-green-refactor_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.ts`

Proceeding to Refactor phase.
